final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing infographic explaining the relationships between AI-related technical concepts.

Style/medium: hand-drawn illustration style, sketch-like diagrams with casual marker strokes, friendly educational infographic aesthetic reminiscent of whiteboard explanations
Composition: flowchart layout with interconnected nodes, top-down hierarchical arrangement showing concept relationships, clear visual pathways connecting related terms
Subject: six technical concepts (AI, MCP, AI Agent, OpenClaw, AI Skill, 蒸馏, CLI) arranged as interconnected nodes with simple icons and connecting arrows
Scene/backdrop: clean off-white paper texture background, minimal distractions, focus on diagram clarity
Color palette: warm muted tones with one accent color per concept category, hand-drawn marker aesthetic with slight color bleed
Text (verbatim): "AI", "MCP", "AI Agent", "OpenClaw", "AI Skill", "蒸馏", "CLI"
Constraints: must be readable at small sizes; text must remain legible; relationships between concepts must be visually clear through connecting lines
Avoid: photorealistic rendering; complex 3D effects; cluttered layouts; tiny unreadable text; corporate stock infographic style; gradients without purpose
